mapper.select: SELECT a.APP_SEQ as appSeq, a.APP_NAME as appName, a.SYS_ID as sysId, a.url, a.params, a.method, a.PERF_TYPE as perfType, a.INFO_USAGE_YN, a.app_attribute_code as appAttributeCode, a.INFO_DET_YN, a.VIEW_YN, b.code_name FROM master.tn_appinfo a, master.tn_code b where a.delete_yn='N' and a.app_attribute_code = b.code order by a.url desc, a.params desc, a.method desc
